# QCS Basic Medical Edition v1

Target: Outpatient clinics (Internal medicine, pediatrics, dermatology, ENT, orthopedics ‚Äď no inpatient beds)

Core Engine:
- Dental Resilience Score‚ĄĘ ‚Üí Medical Resilience Score‚ĄĘ (MRS)
- Drift Detection Index‚ĄĘ (DDI)
- Dependency Risk Score‚ĄĘ (DeRS)
- Structural Clarity Index‚ĄĘ (SCI)

Philosophy:

- Weights / thresholds can be proprietary
